title: [InstCombine] Don't add extra 0 to string in str[np]cpy optimization

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary does not mention address space handling or getelementptr usage for destination pointers, though the patch explicitly passes AddressSpace parameter to CreateGlobalString

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
declare ptr @strncpy(ptr, ptr, i64)

@a = global 32 bytes, align 1
@src_str = constant 4 bytes, align 1

define void @address_space_nonzero() {
init:
  br label %#0

#0:
  %dst = gep inbounds ptr @a, 32 x i64 0, 1 x i64 0
  %#1 = call ptr @strncpy(ptr %dst, ptr @src_str, i64 10)
  ret void
}
=>
declare ptr @strncpy(ptr, ptr, i64)

@a = global 32 bytes, align 1
@src_str = constant 4 bytes, align 1

define void @address_space_nonzero() {
init:
  br label %#0

#0:
  %#1 = call ptr @strncpy(nonnull ptr @a, nonnull ptr @src_str, i64 10)
  ret void
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary does not discuss constant folding of length parameters through arithmetic operations before the strncpy call

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
declare ptr @strncpy(ptr, ptr, i64)

@dst = global 64 bytes, align 1
@src = constant 5 bytes, align 1

define void @strncpy_length_from_constant_arithmetic() {
init:
  br label %#0

#0:
  %len = add i64 10, 6
  %dst_ptr = gep inbounds ptr @dst, 64 x i64 0, 1 x i64 0
  %#1 = call ptr @strncpy(ptr %dst_ptr, ptr @src, i64 %len)
  ret void
}
=>
declare ptr @strncpy(ptr, ptr, i64)

@dst = global 64 bytes, align 1
@src = constant 5 bytes, align 1

define void @strncpy_length_from_constant_arithmetic() {
init:
  br label %#0

#0:
  %#1 = call ptr @strncpy(nonnull ptr @dst, nonnull ptr @src, i64 16)
  ret void
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
